discover_request.objective: Find source-traced MCP/tool/API candidates for selecting a read-only capability discovery helper.
discover_request.query: AI capability discovery MCP tool with source traces and pre-use trust routing

discover_response.objective: Find source-traced MCP/tool/API candidates for selecting a read-only capability discovery helper.
discover_response.query: AI capability discovery MCP tool with source traces and pre-use trust routing

candidates.name: AI Objective Index read-only MCP tools
candidates.why_relevant: Matches objective-to-capability discovery and returns source traces, missing fields, and decision receipts.
candidates.next_action: Run preflight before any recommendation or tool use; keep output read-only until permission scope is explicit.
must_not_claim: AOI clears legal, privacy, license, or compliance status
AOI proves product readiness or quality

candidates.name: AgentSec local manifest review
candidates.why_relevant: Useful when the candidate is a tool or MCP manifest and an agent needs permission or hidden-instruction review.
candidates.next_action: Request an owner-provided local manifest and run only local/offline review.
must_not_claim: AOI clears legal, privacy, license, or compliance status
AOI proves product readiness or quality

candidates.name: DataCapsule local corpus manifest review
candidates.why_relevant: Useful when the objective depends on dataset, corpus, privacy, rights, or eval-leakage boundaries.
candidates.next_action: Ask for a local corpus manifest; do not inspect raw private data or authorize training/action use.
must_not_claim: AOI clears legal, privacy, license, or compliance status
AOI proves product readiness or quality

discover_response.reason: All current sample candidates are useful but remain HOLD until preflight resolves permissions, freshness, and policy clarity.
discover_response.next_action: Choose the most relevant HOLD candidate, run preflight, and request missing fields instead of executing or over-recommending.
must_not_claim: AOI clears legal, privacy, license, or compliance status
AOI proves product readiness or quality

freshness.stale_warning: sample data is static and should be refreshed before external use
freshness.refresh_next_action: refresh source traces or keep candidate in HOLD_STALE_METADATA before recommending external use

preflight_request.intended_use: Use the candidate for read-only comparison and produce a recommendation only after permission scope is clear.

preflight_response.objective: Use the candidate for read-only comparison and produce a recommendation only after permission scope is clear.
preflight_response.reason: The candidate may be useful, but the permission scope is missing; availability alone does not authorize use.
preflight_response.next_action: Ask for permission scope or manifest metadata, then rerun preflight.
allowed_next_steps: compare candidates with missing fields visible
request missing permission or policy details
escalate to ResidualOps local receipt workflow
forbidden_next_steps: merge, deploy, publish, upload, or train
must_not_claim: AOI clears legal, privacy, license, or compliance status
AOI proves product readiness or quality

freshness.stale_warning: sample data is static and should be refreshed before external use
freshness.refresh_next_action: refresh source traces or keep candidate in HOLD_STALE_METADATA before recommending external use

ordinary_agent_bad_behavior_example.behavior: The agent picks the first registry-looking tool and recommends using it before checking permissions.
ordinary_agent_bad_behavior_example.why_bad: It confuses availability with authorization and treats metadata as proof.

corrected_aoi_behavior_example.behavior: The agent returns useful HOLD candidates, exposes missing fields, then runs preflight before recommendation or use.
corrected_aoi_behavior_example.next_action: Ask for permission scope or manifest metadata, then rerun preflight.
